name: academorix/identity
purpose: Global credential record — the Identity aggregate (idn_...) holding email, password hash, MFA secret, and lockout state, shared across every Application.
capabilities: Identity Eloquent model (idn_...) — one row per real human
Consumed by auth module for token issuance
when_to_use: Storing the cross-Application credential record — the central-plane row a user authenticates against.
when_not_to_use: For per-Application User rows (Identity × Application × Tenant), reach for the sibling academorix/user package.
